eidolons.name: Recitatif of Crepuscule
eidolons.description: When an enemy target with Shock is attacked by Kafka, the target's Shock status immediately deals 1 instance of DMG equal to 30% of the original DMG.

eidolons.name: Recitatif of Fishes
eidolons.description: When an ally is attacked, Kafka has a 100% base chance to inflict Shock on the attacker for 2 turns. This effect can only trigger 1 time per turn.

eidolons.name: Recitatif of Cocoons
eidolons.description: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15. Basic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. 10.

eidolons.name: Recitatif of Something
eidolons.description: When Kafka's Talent triggers a follow-up attack, there is a 100% base chance to inflict Shock on the enemy for 2 turns.

eidolons.name: Recitatif of Birds
eidolons.description: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15. Talent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.

eidolons.name: Recitatif of the Beginning
eidolons.description: When using Ultimate, the DMG multiplier for immediately triggering DoT increases by 50%.
